creator: alecn2002@yandex.ru
text:
Martin,

Sorry for late answer.

Sorry to say, but:
1. I couldn't open links you've provided in your message. I've got the following:

Fatal error: Call to a member function getComment() on a non-object in /usr/local/tinderbox2/scripts/webui/module/modulePorts.php on line 66

2. I couldn't reproduce any errors locally. Before submitting the update I've done the following:
- `port test` from porttools package
- updating prev. version of kmymoney2 (I've got 0.8.6 before this one)
- Removing currently installed package of kmymoney2-0.8.8 and reinstalling it from port

All three operations passed w/o any problems.

BTW I use GCC 3.4.6 on my comp, maybe GCC 4.x is a cause?
